versions.name: Cabrillo Beach Youth Waterfront Sports Center
versions.summary: Beachfront aquatics and camping center on Cabrillo Beach in San Pedro, operated by the Greater Los Angeles Area Council, offering Cub Scout and Scout day camps with swimming, kayaking, canoeing, archery, and merit badge programs.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
